title: Container model contract: target_date field + role derivation
description:
FOUNDATION / shared contract — everything else in this epic blocks on it.

Add target_date to the Tick model (precise ISO day, optional) in internal/tick/tick.go + schemas/tick.schema.json (then run make codegen-go AND make codegen-ts per .tick/config.md, commit regenerated output). Add role-derivation helpers in a NEW internal/query/hierarchy.go: container detection (has children) and role classification — tick (leaf,no marker) / empty-epic (leaf,marker) / epic (children,marker) / bucket (children,no marker) / project (contains a container). Epic marker stays the explicit type:epic. See design §1–2.

Files: internal/tick/tick.go, schemas/tick.schema.json, NEW internal/query/hierarchy.go.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./internal/tick/... ./internal/query/... passes; role-derivation tests cover leaf/empty-epic/epic/bucket/project; schema validates target_date; make codegen-go && make codegen-ts clean
closed_reason: Completed: added optional target_date (ISO-day string) + role-derivation helpers (RoleKind/Role/IsContainer/BuildChildIndex) in internal/query/hierarchy.go; codegen regenerated
